scripts.dev:local-data: ADMIN_DATA_SOURCE=local ROOT_ENV_FILES=.env.database.local node ../../scripts/with-root-env.mjs tsx watch --include ../../packages/notifications/src src/index.ts
scripts.dev:live-data: ADMIN_DATA_SOURCE=live ROOT_ENV_FILES=.env.database.main node ../../scripts/with-root-env.mjs tsx watch --include ../../packages/notifications/src src/index.ts
scripts.build:bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs --sourcemap --log-level=warning && esbuild src/cli/migrate.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/migrate.cjs --sourcemap --log-level=warning && esbuild src/cli/seed-catalog-presets.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/seed-catalog-presets.cjs --sourcemap --log-level=warning
scripts.start:local: NODE_ENV=production PORT=3002 ROOT_ENV_FILES=.env.database.local node ../../scripts/with-root-env.mjs tsx src/index.ts
